name: Runick Dispelling
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>解</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>呪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>神碑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ルーン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Activate 1 of these effects, but skip your next Battle Phase after activation;
● If your opponent adds a card(s) from their Deck to their hand, except during the Draw Phase, discard 1 random card from their hand, then banish the top 2 cards of their Deck.
● Special Summon 1 "Runick" monster from your Extra Deck to the Extra Monster Zone.
You can only activate 1 "Runick Dispelling" per turn.
eff:

● Special Summon 1 "Runick" monster from your Extra Deck to the Extra Monster Zone.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Activates if your opponent draws a card
Activates if your opponent adds a card to the hand
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes from the top of your opponent's Deck
